reasoning_content:
Now I understand the task. I need to implement a lexer that:
1. Parses C source code (preprocessed with line markers)
2. Outputs tokens in the same format as `clang -cc1 -dump-tokens`
3. Handle line markers (# linenum filename flags) to track file names and line numbers
4. Output [StartOfLine] and [LeadingSpace] flags appropriately
5. Output location information in format Loc=<file:line:col>
